title: Superintendent of Police, Hnahthial District in Road Block hriattirna a ti chhuak
content:
811/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial 2ndJune, 2026:Pu Shivam Siddharth, Superintendent of Police, Hnahthial District chuan Ni 03.06.2026 (Nilaini) atanga Ni 14.06.2026 (Pathianni) thleng awh tur Road Block hriattirna a ti chhuak.

NOTICE

Hnahthial leh Denlung inkar kawng;Kanaan veng thlanmual atanga Kikawn inkarchu PCC hmangin siam mek a ni a. Kawng siam hna hi chak zawk leh tha zawk a thawh anih theihnan VCP Denlung chuan ziak in SP, Hnahthial hnenah Road Block a rawn dil a. Helai kawng pawimawhtak hi tlo leh tha tak a siam a nih theih nan Gov't of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF, Dt.27.05.2020 in MV Act Sec 115 &117 hmanga lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siam thei tura thuneihna min pek angin,Dt.03.06.2026 (Nilaini) atanga Dt 14.06.2026 (Pathianni)thlengin helai kawngah hian lirthei eng chi mah tlan phal loh (Road Block) a ni tih thupek ka chhuah e.

Road block lo ditu hian helai hmunah hian road block a ni tih mipuiten an hriat theih nan notice/ sign board an tar tur a ni ang.

He thupek hian khuarel chhiatna, kangmei leh emergency kaihhawiha duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bika Police leh Magistrate duty te chetvelna a huam lovang.

Sd/-

(SHIVAM SIDDHARTH) IPS

Superintendent of Police

Hnahthial District: Mizoram

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR INFORMATION & BROADCASTING AND PARLIAMENTARY AFFAIRS VISITS KOLASIB
content:
137/2026-2027

Kolasib, 2nd June, 2026:Shri Dr. L. Murugan, Union Minister of State for the Ministry of Information & Broadcasting and the Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs, arrived in Kolasib this afternoon for a two-day visit. At 3:00 PM, he held an interactive session at the Kolasib DC Conference Hall with representatives from various NGOs, including the Young Mizo Association (YMA), Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP), Mizoram Upa Pawl (MUP), and the Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA), Kolasib. Following this, he held a meeting with the Deputy Commissioner of Kolasib District, Pu H. Dolianbuaia, and the Heads of Offices from various departments.

Addressing the gathering, the Union Minister of State, Dr. L. Murugan, stated that Prime Minister Narendra Modi and the Central Government give high priority to the development of the North East. "The Prime Minister often says that the development of the North East is the development of India. Therefore, significant efforts are being made to improve roads and infrastructure to uplift the people," he said. He also expressed his appreciation to the Heads of Offices and NGO representatives for their dedicated work and efforts in their respective fields.

He expressed his satisfaction with the visible progress made in Sports and Women Empowerment. Highlighting the continuous improvement in connectivity, he mentioned that the Bairabi-Sairang railway line is now operational, and the Rajdhani Express has already started running between Delhi and Sairang. He noted that this has greatly attracted tourists to Mizoram, resulting in a significant increase in visitors from outside the state.

The Minister highlighted that the State Government and the Central Government (Ministry of DoNER) are working closely together to develop the district and the state. As the region is prioritized for development, the Central Government has been highly supportive, which has consequently led to rapid progress.

Speaking about his own portfolio, the Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, he expressed his delight that Mizo filmmakers have been able to participate in the International Film Festival of India (IFFI) in Goa and other platforms. He stated that he would encourage major filmmakers to shoot their films in the beautiful locations of Mizoram. "We aim to make continuous progress by putting our utmost efforts into the tourism and cinema sectors," he added.

He urged the attendees to make their best efforts toward implementing the Central Government's 'PM Surya Ghar' (rooftop solar scheme) initiative. On the topic of education, he emphasized that primary education is crucial as it forms the foundation. Expressing concern over the high dropout rate among students, he stated that maximum efforts are needed to motivate both the children and their parents.

The Minister also called upon the gathering to give their absolute best to achieve the vision of 'Viksit Bharat 2047', an initiative aimed at making India a fully developed and prosperous nation by the year 2047.

During the interactive session with the Union Minister, a PowerPoint presentation highlighting the profile of Kolasib District and the progress of various Government schemes was showcased. This was followed by a Question and Answer (Q&A) session.

Following the conclusion of the official meetings at the DC Conference Hall, the Union Minister proceeded to visit the Kolasib District Hospital . Upon his arrival, he was  received by the District Medical Superintendent and the hospital staff, with whom he held a productive interactive session regarding healthcare delivery and hospital infrastructure.

Tomorrow, the Union Minister is scheduled to conduct site visits to a PM SHRI School, an Anganwadi Centre, Diakkawn High School, Regional Sports Training Center Saidan, and the ICAR (Indian Council of Agricultural Research) campus. Following these visits, he will depart for Delhi.

Attachment

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Siaha tlawh
content:
810/2026-2027

Siaha the 2nd June 2026 :Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan vawiin tlai khan Siaha thlengin Tourist Lodge-ah  District Bawrhsap Pu VL Hruaizela Khiangte hovin Sawrkar hotute, Tlawmngai pawl aiawhte leh Party aiawhten lo dawngsawngin reception hall-ah inkawmhona hun tawi an hmang.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan kalkhawmte chu chibai a buk a, sawrkar department hrang hrang thawhhona chu fakawm a tih thu sawiin hun lo la kal zel turah pawh district hmasawnna turin theihtawp chhuah tlang turin a chah.

Siaha-a health lama thawktute hnathawh chu chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin malaria leh scrub typhus laka beihpui an thlakna kawngah an chhuanawm takzet a ti a, Tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang bakah kohhran ten sawrkar hmalakna an tawiawm that thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Ruahman lawk dan ang chuan Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Naktuk hian Siaha a Nursing school sak mek bakah Maraland Gospel Centenary Hospital a tlawh ang a, District Hospital a CT Scan khawl thar leh RtPCR laboratory  thar a hawng nghal dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: UNION MINISTER OF STATE FOR INFORMATION & BROADCASTING & PARLIAMENTARY AFFAIRS IN KOLASIB A TLAWH
content:
809/2026-2027

Kolasib, 2nd June, 2026:Vawiin tlai khan Dr L Murugan, Union Minister of State for  Ministry of Information & Broadcasting and Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs chuan ni hnih cham turin Kolasib a thleng a. Tlai dar 3:00 khan Kolasib DC Conference Hall ah tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang - YMA, MHIP, MUP leh MJA Kolasib aiawhte kawmna hun a hmang a. Hemi zawh hian Kolasib District Deputy Commisioner, Pu H Dolianbuaia leh Department hrang hrang Head of Office-te nen inkawmna  a nei zui bawk.

He  inkawmkhawmna ah hian Union Minister of State, Dr L Murugan chuan thu sawiin, Prime Minister Narendra Modi leh sawrkar laipui chuan Hmarchhak (North East) hmasawnna chu a ngai pawimawh hle a ni, a ti a. "Prime Minister chuan North East hmasawnna hi India ram hmasawnna a ni a ti thin a, chuvang chuan mipuite hmasawn theih nan kawngpui leh hmasawnna ruhrel (infrastructure) tihchangtlun kawngah pawh nasa takin hma a la a ni," a ti. Head of Office te leh NGO aiawh kalkhawmte chu anmahni line theuha theihtawp chhuaha hna an thawk chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Infiamna (Sports) leh hmeichhe dinhmun chawikanna (Women Empowerment) lamah te hmasawnna hmuh tur a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Inkalpawhna a tha chho zel a, Bairabi leh Sairang inkar rel kawng pawh hman tan a ni tawh a, tunah phei chuan Rajdhani Express pawh Delhi leh Sairang inkarah a tlan tawh thu a tarlang. Hei hian Mizoramah  khualzin  a hip lut nasa hle a, State pawn atanga tlawhtu  nasa takin  a pung chho a ni, a ti.

State sawrkar leh Central sawrkar (DoNER Ministry) te tangkawpin district leh state hmasawnna turin tha an thawh nasa hle a, hmasawnna kalpui na tura ngaihpawimawh (priority) kan nih angin sawrkar laipui pawhin min duhsak hle a, chumi zarah chuan hmasawnna pawh a pung nasa hle a ni, a ti bawk.

Amah ngeiin a chan, Information & Broadcasting Ministry chungchang sawiin, Mizoram  film siamtute te pawh International Film Festival, Goa leh hmun dang dangah te an tel ve thei chu  lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a.  Film siamtu lian tak takte chu Mizoram hmun mawi tak taka shoot turin ala  sawihmuh ve tur thu a sawi a," tourism leh cinema lamah theihpatawpa hma la chhovin hmasawnna neih zel kan tum dawn a ni," a ti.

Sawrkar laipui hmalakna 'PM Surya Ghar' (In tina solar eng vuahna) chungchangah theihtawp chhuaha hma la turin kalkhawmte a chah a. Zirna chungchang tarlangin, primary education chu a bul thut a nih avangin a pawimawh hle a ti a, zirlai naupang zirna bansan (dropout rate) a sang chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, heng naupangte leh an nu leh pa te fuihna  kawngah theihpatawp chhuah a tul hle a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan kum 2047-a India ram ropui leh hmasawn a nih theih nana hmachhawp, 'Viksit Bharat 2047' tihlawhtling turin theihpatawp chhuah theuh turin kalkhawmte chu a chah bawk.

Union Minister in inkawmna hun a hmanpui lai hian Kolasib District chungchang leh Sawrkar schemes hrang hrang hmasawnna tarlanna PowerPoint hmanga tihchhuah a ni a , zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk.

DC Conference Hall-a thutkhawmna neih zawh hian Union Minister hian Kolasib District Hospital a tlawh chhunzawm nghal a. Damdawi in a thlen hian District Medical Superintendent leh damdawi ina thawktuten an lo dawngsawng a, anmahni nen hian mipuite hnena hriselna leh in enkawlna kalpui dan leh damdawi in bungraw mamawh leh hmunhma (hospital infrastructure) chungchang sawiho in inkawmna hun  an hmang a ni.

Naktuk hian Union Minister hian PM SHRI School, Anganwadi Centre, Diakkawn High School, Regional Sports Training Center Saidan leh ICAR te a hmunah a tlawh ang a, chumi zawhah Delhi panin a kir leh nghal ang.

Attachment

title: Sumdawnna kawngah India ram Danpui kalh loa ram leilungfate humhalh dan tur ngaihtuah
content:
808/2026-2027

Aizawl the 2nd June, 2026:Vawiin tlai dar 3 khan Mizoram Secretariat Conference Hall, MINECO ah Dr. H. Lianzela, IAS, Secretary, Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Department hoin The Draft Mizoram Trade and Enterprises (Formalization and Facilitation) Bill, 2026 chungchang sawiho a ni a. He hunah hian CYMA, MZP, MSU, MCCI, AMFU, City Local Council Association leh he bill in a kaihhnawih tur Department hrang hrang aiawh te an tel a ni.

He dan thar tura duan hi Mizoram chhunga sumdawnna felfai zawka kalpui dan tur leh bazar hrang hrangte enkawl dan tur chungchang a ni a. Sumdawnna kawngah India Danpui (Constitution) kalh silo a ram leilungfate humhalh an nih theihna tura fimkhur taka Dan siam a nih theih nan inrawnkhawmna (consultation) hi neih a ni.

He inrawnkhawmna hi a bul tanna niin, zau zawka inrawnkhawmna hi la neih leh tur a ni a. Kalkhawm te ngaihdan leh rawtna te chu ziakin June ni 30, 2026 ral hmain Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining department-ah thehlut tura ngen an ni. Chairman Dr.H.Lianzela chuan he Dan thar duan turah hian theihtawp chhuah tlang turin leh a tha thei ang bera Dan siam a nih theih nan kalkhawmte chu thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii'n Lungleia MIZOFED building sak thar a hawng
content:
807/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 2:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkara Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Lunglei Electric Venga MIZOFED (Mizoram State Cooperative Marketing & Consumers' Federation Limited) building sak thar a hawng.

Khuallian Pi Lalrinpuii chuan MIZOFED building thar hawn a ni ta chu Lunglei mipuite tan hmasawnna ropui tak a nih thu sawiin, Mizote chu thil tih ho nuam ti chi, feh kawng, tui chawina leh thing phurhna thlenga ṭhiante nena inlawma thil ti ṭhin kan nih angin kan mizia leh co-operative society chu inhmeh hlea a hriat thu a sawi a. Cooperative Society chuan Mizoramah zung a kaih thuk hle tih sawiin, khaw tin veng tin deuhthawah society dawr din a nih thu leh tun thleng pawhin thingtlang khaw tam takah mipuite tana dawr hlawhtling tak a la nih reng thu a sawi a. Mizoramah kum 1981 aṭanga State pum huap Cooperative Society hlawhtling tak mai MIZOFED din a ni a, tun thlenga hlawhtling taka kalpui a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, mipui mimir chuan MIZOFED chu a man tlawma thil zawrhna leh a hlawma thil lak tlawm theihna tia an hriat ṭhin a nih thu te, MIZOFED-ah chuan thil lem leh quality ṭha lo zawrh a nih ngai loh thu te a sawi a. Chu hmingṭhatna chu vawng nung reng turin thawktute pawh a chah nghal.

Pi Lalrinpuii chuan MIZOFED chu State pum huap Cooperative Society a nih avangin sawrkar pawhin a theih ang anga a lo duhsak ṭhin thu leh thawktute nen pawh inpawh tlang tak leh ṭhahnem ngai taka an thawh ho ṭhin thu sawiin, sawrkar nen thawh hona ṭha tak chu chhawm nung zel a, ram hmasawn nan theih tawpa ṭan la zel turin a chah a. MIZOFED Office Building thar pawh chu mipuite leh society tana ṭangkai taka hman a nih a, mi tam tak tana malsawmna a nih chho zel a beisei thu sawiin, duhsakna a hlan.

MIZOFED building hawnna inkhawm hi MIZOFED Chairman Pu K. Rothangpuia chuan kaihruaiin, kal khawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Former Chairman Upa C. Vanlalmuana chuan hunserh hmangin, Managing Director Pu Lalhruaitluanga chuan technical report a pe a. Vice Chairman Pu Vunghnuna chuan lawm thu sawiin hun a khar.

Lungleia MIZOFED building sak nan hian cheng nuai 80 (₹80,00,000/-) ruahman niin, a sak hna hi Cascade Architecture and Engineering Zotlang Aizawl (Northpoint Consultancy) te'n an thawk a. March ni 1, 2025 khan hna thawh ṭan niin, thla 12 leh ni 2 chhungin sak zawh a ni a. A building hi chhawng hnih niin, a chhawng hnuai (ground floor) hi square feet 1,761-a zau leh a chhawng chung zawk (first floor) hi square feet 1,652-a zau a ni a. A chung zawl (roof area) hi square feet 1,652-a zau a ni bawk a. MIZOFED sum thawh chhuah aṭanga sak a ni.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL DC IN AIZAWL DISTRICT HUAM CHHUNGA PHALNA NEI LOVA PETROL LEH DIESEL ZAWRH KHAPNA THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
806/2026-2027

Aizawl the 2nd June, 2026:Sawrkar hriatpuina lova petrol leh diesel zawrh chhawn hi dan bawhchhiatna niinSection 5 & 6 of the Mizoram Motor Spirit and High Speed Diesel (Prevention of Malpractices in Supply and Distribution) Order, 1992kalh tlat a ni. Tin,Section 7 leh 8 of the Petroleum Act, 1934in a tarlan dan chuan mimal in license ngai lova petrol (Class A) an kawl phal chin chulitre 30(zawrh tur ni lo chauh) leh diesel (Class B)litre 2500(container pakhat zel litre 1000 aia tam lo dawng thei chin ah) a ni a.

Chuvangin,Er. Lalhriatpuia, District Magistrate, Aizawl Districtchuan dan ang taka petrol leh diesel hralh a lo nih theih nan leh kangmei laka inipuite kan lo him tlan zawk nanSection 163, BNSS 2023in thuneihna a pek angin a hnuaia thupek hi a chhuah.

“Aizawl District huamchhungah mi tumahin phalna nei lovin Petrol leh Diesel an zuar in an hralh tur a ni lo a. Dan in a phal chin aia tam mi tumahin an kawl (stock) tur a ni lo.”

He khapna thupek zawm lo te chu an petrol/diesel man sak an ni anga,Section 223 BNS 2023hmangin an chungah hremna lek theih a ni bawk ang. He thupek hi chhuah a nih atanginthla hnih (2 months)chhung a huam ang.

District Magistrate Seal-a nemnghetin he thupek hi1stJune, 2026khan hming a ziah hnan.

title: DISTRICT LEVEL COMMITTEE ON GREEN MIZORAM DAY,  SERCHHIP DISTRICT THUKHAWM
content:
804/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 2nd June 2026:Vawiin khan District Level Committee on Green Mizoram,   Serchhip District  chu an Chairman, District bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin DC Meeting Hall-ah an thukhawm a, Green Mizoram Day, 2026 hman dan tur leh ṭul dangte rel hona neih a ni.

Kumin hian Green Mizoram Day Theme atan State Level Committee on Green Mizoram in alo rel tawh angin,  "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni", tih hman a ni dawn a.

Green Mizoram Day Inaugural Function chu ni 11th June , 2026-ah DC Hall-ah neih tur niin hemi ni hian thing phun nghal tura rel a ni a. Thing ṭiak te chu Kikawn aṭanga Keiṭum inkarah phunin, heng thingphun te hi Sawrkar Department hrang hrangten in chan semin, a phun leh enkawlah pawh mawh an phur dawn a. He hunah hian kum danga tih ṭhin angin, Serchhip District huam chhunga kangmei ven kawnga hma la ṭha khua thlan chhuahte hnenah lawmman pek nghal tura rel a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: Union Minister of State Dr. L. Murugan Mizoram lo thleng; State Minister-te nena pawimawh hrang hrang an sawiho hnuah Kolasib lam a pan nghal
content:
803/2026-2027

Aizawl, 2nd June 2026: Dr. L. Murugan, Hon’ble Union Minister of State for Information & Broadcasting and Parliamentary Affairs, Government of India chuan zan khat riaka Mizoram rawn tlawh turin vawiin khan Lengpui Airport a lo thleng.

Union Minister hi Airport-ah Information, Public Relations, Printing & Stationery department changtu minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova leh Information & Communication Technology changtu minister Dr. Vanlalthlana te bakah sorkar hotu lian dangten an lo hmuak a ni.

Airport-ah hian meeting nei nghalin, Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Mizoram chhunga chanchinbu/media, film industry, leh digital infrastructure tihmasawnna tura rawtna pawimawh tak tak te Union Minister hnenah hian a thlen a ni:

Union Minister pawhin mamawh an thlen te chu tihhlawhtlin ngei a tum thu a sawi a, Mizoram film festival-ah pawh lo kal ve a chak thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Official schedule tarlan dan chuan, Union Minister hian vawiinah Kolasib district-ah hun a hmang chhunzawm anga, District Deputy Commissioner leh official dangte nen inkawmhona leh review meeting an nei dawn a ni. Zanin hian Kolasib Circuit House-ah a riak ang a, naktuk zing lamah project site hrang hrang a tlawh chhunzawm dawn a ni.

title: DISTRICT AIDS PREVENTION AND CONTROL COMMITTEE THUKHAWM; MOBILIZATION FOR AIDS SURAKSHA CHUNGCHANGA SERCHHIP DISTRICT ACTION PLAN ENHO A NI
content:
802/2026-2027

Serchhip, the 2nd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip District AIDS Prevention and Control Committee chu an Chairman, Serchhip District Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruainain an thukhawm a. He hunah hian 'Mobilization for AIDS Suraksha' chungchanga Serchhip District Action Plan siam chungchang sawi ho a ni.

Pu R. Lalhruaitluanga leh Dr. Alfred C. Lalhmingmuana, DISHA Lunglei-ten District Action Plan Presentation pein, '95-95-99' target-a Serchhip District dinhmunte an tarlang a.95-95-99hi HIV/AIDS dona kawnga bituk pawimawh tak niin a awmzia chu HIV hrik pai zinga95%ten inentirna hmanga an inhriat chhuah a, chung zinga95%ten damdawi (ART) an ei a, damdawi ei zinga99%ten an taksaa HIV hrikte an thunun (suppress) na tur a ni a. Serchhip District- dinhmun chu - Target 1st 95-ah 68.8% awmin, 2nd 95-ah 95% hnuailam niin, 3rd 99-ah hi 95.9% te a ni a. Vawiin meeting-ah hian heng target-te hi tha zawka hlen a nih theih nan, sawrkar leh khawtlang hruaitute thawh ho a pawimawh zia sawi lan niin District Action Plan bawhzuina kawnga an mawhphurhnate thlir ho a ni bawk.

Pi Lalruatfeli, Programme Officer, P&OCS CSS chuan District Community Resource Group (D-CRG) pawimawhzia sawiin, TE DISHA YRG Pu Peter Lalrinngheta’n 'Breakfree Website' chungchang a hrilhfiah a. He website-ah hian HIV/AIDS chungchanga mahni inbihchianna (self-assessment) te, testing tih dan leh tih theihna hmun te, leh ART Centre awmna hmun hrang hrang te a en vek theih a ni. He website-ah hian Artificial Intelligence (A.I.) dah nghal niin, mizo ṭawng ngeiin HIV/AIDS chungchanga zawhna neih zawng zawngte a zawh theih nghal vek bawk a ni. He website hi mipui zawng zawngin an hman tangkai theih nan a tam thei ang ber theh darh (publicise) nise tiin committee chuan a rel a ni.Vawiin meeting-ah hian Serchhip District-a kum tina kalpui thin 'Red Ribbon Quiz Competition' chu kumin hian hlawhtling taka neih leh tura rel a ni bawk a. District Level Quiz Competition hi ni 30 July, 2026 hmaa neih tura tih a ni a. School Level Quiz chu ni 18 June, 2026 hian Serchhip District chhunga Class 8, 9 leh 11 zirlai zawng zawng tan neih a ni anga, School hrang hrang zinga ti tha 'Top 10' te thlang chhuakin, District Level Competition chu ni 28 July, 2026 hian DC Pisapui Hall-ah neih zui tura rel a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: AIZAWL DISTRICT CHHUNGA  MIZORAM BANA KAIH (HANDHOLDING) SCHEME  HNUAIA CM’s SPECIAL PACKAGE PHASE-II DAWNGTU PROGRESS PARTNERS 277 TE TAN  ORIENTATION TRAINING LEH PACKAGE HLANNA PROGRAMME BUATSAIH A NI
content:
801/2026-2027

Aizawl; 2nd June, 2026: Vawiin   khan Vana Pa Hall-ah DC office buatsaihin Bana kaih (Handholding) scheme hnuaia CM's  Special Package  Grant phase -II  dawngtu progress partners 277 te hnenah Orientation training leh package semna programme neih a ni a. Chawhmaah Orientation Training neih niin, chawhnuah CM’s Package semna hun hman a ni thung CM’s Special package semna hun hi Aizawl bawrhsap Er.Lalhriatpuia'n  kaihhruaiin, Dr.KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to Chief Minister, Handholding Scheme leh Vice Chairman Mizoram State  Policy Coordination Committee (MSPCC) ni bawk chuan khuallian niin  hun a hmanpuia,  CM’s special package  grant phase-II , progress partners te hnenah certificate a sem nghal  a ni.

Vawiin programme-ah thu sawiin Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuanIndia ram state hrang hrang ten, an mi leh sate eizawnna leh chawikanna tur an duan zingah hian Mizoram Handholding scheme hi a tha ber a nih loh pawhin a aia tha kan hre mai lo.Kan handholding scheme hnuaiah hian sawrkar guarantor-a a tan bakah a pung zawng zawng a rulhpui leh vek a  ni. Hriat theih chinah States 7 vel hian an mi leh sate tan sawrkar guarantorah a tang a, chutih laiin, keini anga a pung zawng zawng rulhsak (100% interest free loan) pe hi chu Telengana state chiah an awma, chu pawh women entrepreneur mi 300 tan chauh a ni. Heti chunga kan hlawhtlinpui thei lo a nih chuan entrepreneur te pawh inenfiah kan ngai ang, a ti.

Dr. KC. Malsawmzauva chuan CM Special Package hi a thlawna sum sem ringawt a ni lo, Project based a ni.Project-based kan tih kherna chhan pawh- ruahmanna felfai tak nen hma in lak kan duhpui vang che u a ni. Uluk takin implementing department leh District Monitoring team ten an rawn umzui dawn che u a ni. Keini ho zingah hian ti tak tak lo kan lo awm palh a nih chuan in mualpho hle dawn a ni. Handholding Guide book page-5 naah chuan pawisa hmang tha lo te chu hrem theih an ni anga, an pawisa dawn tawh laksak emaw, a pawisa hu thil dang chawitir theih a ni ang’ tih a awm kiau a ni. Kan ram hian lem chang nilo, mi ti tak tak kan mamawh tawh, a ni a ti bawk.

Sawi zawmin, khuallian chuan hmasawnna hi mi tam tak chuan sum leh pai-ah kan the fo thin; a ni ber lo. Hmasawnna   reng reng mihring-ah a thleng hmasa tur a ni. Rilru lama hmasawnna a thlen hmasak loh chuan sum a tam poh leh kan chhiatpui nasa ting mai. Mizo zingah hausak zo lo hmuh tur kan tam lutuk. Sum tlemte chunga rinawm leh dik chu sum tam tak-ah pawh an rintlak ang. CMSP in hman tangkai danah in mizia leh quality a lang dawn a ni, a ti.

Mi thenkhat te atangin kan va dawng har ve? Kan submit rual reng si a, tinge a ni’n a dawna ka la dawn  ve loh? tih zawhna an dawn nasat thu sawiin, a chhanna chu hetiang hian a sawi:

Dilna reng reng a kaihhnawih department ten an endik hnuah Departmental Nodal Committee (DNC) ten a changtu Minister hoin an endik thlap hnuah Apex Body-ah an lo thehlut a, an ni’n an approve leh thin.

Department thenkhatin an ngah deuha, a thenin an nei tlem deuha, a ruala submit pawh nise a department kaihhnawihte DNC thut hun a in an loh avangin an dawn hun a in ang thei thin lo a. Department chak leh chak loh ah thui tak a innghat a n, a ti.

Sawhthing Support Price pawh kan in pe chhuak mek zela, tuna la hmu mai lo te pawh DAMC lamah lo zawt ula, an ni lamin an rawn tihfel chuan inpek chhuah zel kan tuma, dawhthei taka lo nghak hram hram turin kan in chah a ni.Kalphung thar hnuaiah chuan fimkhur taka kal kan tuma, a process pawh a chak vut vut theih loh chang a awm thin, a ti bawk.

Mizoram pumpuiah Bana Kaih phase 2 hnuaiah CM Package dawng tur Progress partners Apex Body-in a approved tawh hi mi 1129 an awm tawh a, a sum zawng chuan Rs. 5,62,36,997/- (5.32 crores) a ni. Phase –II hnuaia progress partners 439 hnenah Loan Rs. 40,51,85,565/- (40.5 crores) pek chhuah tawh a ni bawk.

Vawiin Aizawl district huam chhunga CM’s Special package dawngtu Progress Partners, department wise a  awm dant chu:

Tanpuina sum hi  installment a pe lovin, a vaiin vawikhatah  DBT  in  Progress partner te  Bank account-ah  thunsak vek an ni ang. Progress partner pakhat hnena  tanpuina sum  pek hi  ₹50,000 aia tam lo theuh a ni.

Pu Lalhmangaiha, DCIO chuan ‘Vote of thanks’ sawiin vawiin programme hi a khar ta a ni.

title: MLA PU JEJE LALPEKHLUA HOVIN HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT TAN CM SPECIAL PACKAGE PHASE-II SEMNA HUN HMANG
content:
800/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 2ndJune, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Hnahthial-ah Sorkar Flagship Programme - Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia Chief Minister Special Package Phase-II semna hun chu neih niin South Tuipui Bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Addl. Deputy Commissioner, Hnahthial chuan semna hun hi kaihruaiin tanpuina sum hi Hnahthial District atangin mi sawmhnih leh pali (24) ten an dawng a ni.

Khuallian chuan thu sawiin sawrkar atanga hamthatna awmte chu a dawngtuten a nihna tur ang taka an hmang chhuak lo thin chu pawi a tih thu a sawi a. Tuna CM Special Package an dawn tur pawh hi a hma a lo dawng tawh ten engtin nge an hman tih ngaihven chunga a tha thei ang bera hmang turin a dawngtute chu a chah a. Sorkar hmalaknate a hlawhtlin theih nan Department lama hotuten theihtawp an lo chhuah thin chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawiin he tanpuina dawngtuten harsatna engpawh an nei a nih chuan a changtu Department-te chu rawn hreh lo turin a chah a ni.

Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte, Addl. DC, Hnahthial chuan CM Special Package chu tum bik neia thilthlawn pek a nih angin a dawngtute chu a hlawhtlinna hmu thei tura tan la turin a chah a, a petute tihmingchhetu nilo hram turin a chah nghal bawk.

Thusawi zawh hian DIPRO Office atanga Bana Kaih Success Story buatsaihte chu thlir ho nghal a ni.

CM Special Package Phase-II atanga tanpuina dawngtu awm zat leh an Department dilnate chu tarlan ang hi a ni :-

1. Commerce & Industries - Mi sawm leh pali (14)

2. Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare - Mi Pakhat (1)

3. Fisheries - Mi Pariat (8)

4. Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation - Mi Pakhat (1)

Tanpuina sum hi a vaiin mi Sawmhnih leh Pali (24) te hnehah pek niin Progress Partner pakhat tan tanpuina Rs 50,000 zel pek an ni. He hunah hian a changtu Department-te hnen atangin hriattur pawimawh inhrilhhriatna hun hmang nghal a ni bawk.

Programme zawh hian Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan Hnahthial khaw chhunga hnathawh mek te chu a enfiah nghal a ni.

title: LOK SABHA MP HOVIN KOLASIB-AH DISHA THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
799/2026-2027

Kolasib, 2nd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha) Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha hovin Kolasib-ah District Development Coordination and Monitoring Committee (DISHA) thutkhawm neih a ni. He hunah hian Pu H Dolianbuaia,Kolasib Deputy Commissioner leh Department hrang hrang aiawhte leh prominent citizens te an tel a ni.

He hun hmanpuitu MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan thu tawi sawiin, department hrang hrang ten theihpatawp chhuaha mipui tana hma an la thin chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram hmasawnna chu a taka hna thawk tu Department te kutah nasa takin a innghat a ni, tiin, DISHA hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrangte chu chak zawk leh tangkai zawka kalpui a nih theih nan thahnemngai taka thawk zel turin kalkhawmte chu a fuih a ni.

He thutkhawmah hian department hrang hrang ten October 2025 atanga March 2026 inkar chhunga an hmalakna report thenkhat te chu a hnuaiah hian tarlan an ni.

Thingtlang Hmasawnna, Lo Neih leh inkalpawhna: Kolasib District-ah hmasawnna ruhrel leh thingtlang lo neitute chawikanna kawngah hma lakna lian tak tak a awm a. MGNREGS hnuaiah ni za inhlawhna tha taka kalpui a ni a, PMAY-G hnuaiah in thahnem tak sak zawh a ni bawk . WDC-PMKSY 2.0 hnuaiah watershed project lian pathum (Kolasib-I, II leh III) te kalpui mek a ni a. MzSRLM hnuaiah SHG te hmalaknain aieng Metric Ton 71 lai thar chhuah a ni a, hei hian lo neitute eizawnna kawngah nasa takin a pui a ni . Agriculture leh Horticulture lamah pawh PM-RKVY, MIDH leh PM-KISAN hmangin lo neitute hnenah tanpuina pek thin a ni a . Loneitute thlai thar tihhmasawn nan PM-RKVY kaltlangin Chemphai-ah seed multiplication farm leh Thingdawl-ah tissue culture laboratory siam a ni a. PM-KISAN hnuaiah loneitu mi 12,475 hnenah tanpuina pek an ni. Horticulture department chuan dragonfruit, thingfanghma leh hmarcha chin uar chhovin, PMKSY-PDMC hnuaiah tui pek dan changkang zawk (micro-irrigation system) bun a ni bawk.

PMGSY-III hnuaia Khamrang atanga Mualkhang inkar kawng siam hna chu April 2026 thleng khan 73.11% thawh zawh a ni bawk.

Hriselna, Zirna leh Hmeichhe/Naupang Humhimna: Hriselna lamah hma sawnna duhawm tak hmuh tur a awm a, nau piang za a 98% laite chu damdawi inah (institutional delivery) him taka piang an ni a, Ayushman card pawh reporting period chhung hian 531 siam a ni . Poshan Abhiyaan hnuaiah Anganwadi Centre 139 atangin naupang 7,817 leh naupai/hnute pe lai nu 1,000 dawn ten hamthatna an dawng.Hmeichhiate humhimna leh tanpuina turin One Stop Centre (OSC) hmangin theih tawp chhuah a ni a. Zirna lamah Samagra Shiksha kaltlangin school building siamthat, inthiarna siam leh zirlaite tana hamthatna (stipend, escort allowance) hrang hrang pek an ni a, Samagra Shiksha hnuaia Netaji Subash Chandra Bose Avasiya Vidhyalaya (NSCBAV) hmeichhe hostel te pawh tih changtlung zel a ni.

Khawpui Hmasawnna, Tui thianghlim leh Project Dangte: Khawpui hmasawnna leh mipuite tana tui thianghlim pek kawngah PHED in tui lakna (Water Supply Scheme) lian tham Kolasib leh Vairengte-ah an kalpui mek a, hengte hi hman theih tura zawh fel fel thuai tura beisei an ni . Urban Development hnuaiah PMAY (Urban) hmangin in sak tanpuina kalpui a ni a, PM SVANidhi hmangin kawngsira thil zuartute hnenah sumdawnna atana loan pek an ni bawk . Heng bakah hian Land Revenue lamah ram neitu dik tak chhinchhiahna SVAMITVA leh DILRMP kalpui mek a ni a . DoNER leh NEC kaltlangin Kolasib District Hospital khum 100 awm theihna tur sak mek leh project lian dang, Bamboo link road pawh report a a lan danin 85% lai thawh zawh tawh a ni.

Heng hmalakna tarlan bakah hian sawmbik, Railways (NFR), NHIDCL , NEEEPCO leh POWERGRID atangin report tawi ngaihthlak a ni. Thutkhawmna tan a nih hmain Kolasib Bawrhsap lo ni tawh, boral ta Pu Robert C. Lalhmangaiha sun nan kalkhawmte chuan ngawi rengin minute khat hun an hman a ni bawk.

title: HOME MINISTER PU K. SAPDANGA’N SERCHHIP DISTRICT JAIL A TLAWH; SASCI HNUAIA JAIL THAWM THAHT HNA THAWH MEKTE A ENFIAH
content:
798/2026-2027

Serchhip, the 2nd June, 2026:Vawiin khan Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Serchhip District Jail tlawhin, Jail thawmthat leh tih changtlunna hna hrang hrang thawh mekte a hmunah a enfiah a. Home Department Secretary Pu Vanlalmawia leh Serchhip District Superintendent of Police Pu Gavit Gogna te bakah sawrkar official-te'n an tawiawm a ni.

Distirct Jail-a tlawhnaah hian Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin, 'Mizoram District hrang hrang a tlawh tawhte zingah Serchhip District Jail chu a fel faiin, mit a kham lo ber awm mang e aw' a ti a. Jail building sak that hna hrang hrang thawh mekah, a thawktu PWD leh Contractor-te chu theihtawp chhuah zui zel turin a chah bawk. Sawrkar hna hrang hrang zingah mihring enkawl, a bikin sualna kawnga tlu tawh Jail tangte enkawl chu, hna hautak leh pawimawh em em a nih thu a sawi a. Jail chu mihring tha lote rilru leh taksa siam ṭhatna hmun a nih avangin, a hmingah pawh 'Prison and Correctional Services' tia thlak a nih tawh thu sawiin, mi tangte chu rilru lamah chauh ni lo, taksa lamah pawh an lo hrisel zawk theih nan Medical Staff-te'n regular taka an tlawh thinna turin, hma lak zui zel a nih tur thu a sawi bawk.

Serchhip District Jail sak that leh tih changtlun hna hi SASCI 2024-2025 hnuaiah Rs. 3.7 Crore hu senga thawh mek a ni a. Administrative Building thawm ṭhat leh zauh belh hna te, Multipurpose Hall leh Barrack thar sak hna te, mi tang thenkhatte khung hranna tur Segregation Cell leh Skill Training-na tur Vocational Hall sak hnate bakah, Guard Duty Post leh MI Room tih zauh hna te, Male Ward - 2 (1st floor) leh Chapel sak ṭhat hna te, Staff Quarters leh Superintendent Quarters sak hnate thawh mek a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Home Department Secretary Pu Vanlalmawia pawhin thu sawiin, Jail tangte hriselna ngaih pawimawh a tul thu leh Medical duty ngaih pawimawh a tul thu te leh Jail vengtute tan, mi tangte enkawl dan leh thil hrang hrangahte training ngaih pawimawh a tul thute a sawi bawk.

title: HOME MINISTER PU K. SAPDANGA’N SAINIK SCHOOL CHHINGCHCHIP A TLAWH; CSD CANTEEN THAR A HAWNG NGHAL
content:
797/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 2nd June, 2026: Vawiin khan Mizoram Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Sainik School Chhingchhip a tlawh a, Unit Run CSD Canteen thar a hawng nghal bawk. Home Minister hi MLA Lt. Col. Clement Lalhmingthanga, Home Department Secretary Pu Vanlalmawia, Jt. Secretary Pu PC Lalduhthlanga, 14th Assam Rifles hotute leh sawrkar official dangte'n an tawiawm a ni.

Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin, Sainik School chu ram leh hnam tana mi rintlak, rinawm leh discipline tha nei tura inzirtirna hmun pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. Zirlaite chu ram leh hnam tana mi tangkai tak tak nih tum tura fuihin thawktute pawh ram tana mi tangkai chher chhuak deuh deuh turin duhsakna a hlan bawk a; Sainik School-a Unit run, CSD Canteen hawn thar chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, mipui vantlang tan, bungraw man tlawm zawk leh tha tak takte an chhawp chhuahsak zel a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Sainik School Principal Colonel Soumyabrata Dhara'n Home Minister hi lawmna thilpek a pe a, zirlaite'n hnam zai leh lam hmuhnawm tak an entir bawk a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER INAUGURATES GINGER MISSION PROJECTS, PRICE SUPPORT SCHEME AND EXPORT WORKSHOP
content:
135/2026-2027

Aizawl, 2 June 2026:Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma today inaugurated the Mizo Ginger USP Mission Projects, the Price Support Scheme for Arhar (Tur), Sesame and Sunflower and the NCEL Ginger Export Awareness Workshop at YRC, Falkland.

In his address, the Chief Minister said ginger remains one of Mizoram’s most important crops and has been identified as the State’s Unique Selling Proposition (USP) under the Ministry of DoNER. While Mizoram ginger is smaller in size, its exceptional quality and pharmaceutical-grade standards give it a strong competitive advantage. He emphasized the need to move beyond selling raw ginger and focus on processing and value addition to increase farmers’ income and ensure sustainable cultivation practices.

He said the State Government, with support from the Ministry of DoNER, has launched a Sustainable Cultivation and Post-Harvest Management Project. Under the project, four modern ginger processing units are being established in Champhai district, the State’s largest ginger-producing district, with financial support of ₹30.13 crore from DoNER. The initiative is expected to benefit around 20,000 ginger-growing households and generate about 100 jobs. He expressed gratitude to Union Minister for DoNER, Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia, for the Ministry’s support.

The Chief Minister further stated that the Government aims to position Mizoram ginger in national and international markets by leveraging its superior quality and GI Tag status. Plans are also underway to develop high-value products such as ginger oil and other processed ginger products. To strengthen export readiness, the National Cooperative Exports Limited (NCEL) has been engaged to provide training and awareness on export procedures and market access.

Highlighting support for farmers, the Chief Minister announced the implementation of the PM-AASHA Price Support Scheme in Mizoram for Arhar (Tur), Sesame and Sunflower from the current harvest season. The Minimum Support Price (MSP) has been fixed at ₹84.50 per kg for Arhar (Tur), ₹103.46 per kg for Sesame and ₹83.43 per kg for Sunflower. Procurement will be undertaken by NAFED in collaboration with the Mizoram Agricultural Marketing Board through designated collection centres. Payments will be made directly to farmers' bank accounts through the Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) system, ensuring transparency and eliminating intermediaries.

The Chief Minister noted that, in addition to the crops already covered under the State Government’s MSP initiatives, three more crops are now receiving price support through the Central Government, providing further assurance and market security to farmers. He urged all stakeholders to work together to ensure the success of the projects and programmes launched today.

The programme was attended by around 250 participants, including farmers, representatives of Farmer Producer Organisations (FPOs), cooperative societies and officials from various districts. The inauguration was followed by the NCEL Ginger Export Awareness Workshop.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN PROJECT PAHNIH LEH WORKSHOP A HAWNG
content:
796/2026-2027

Aizawl the 2nd June 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Youth Recreation Hall (YRC), Falkland-ah Mizo Ginger USP Mission Project te, Price Support Scheme for Arhar Dal, Chhawhchhi leh Nihawi te bakah NCEL Ginger Export Awareness Workshop te a hawng.

Pu Lalbiakzama, Speaker, Pu C. Lalsawivunga, Minister, Pu PC Vanlalruata, Minister, Pu Lalfamkima, Deputy Speaker, Pu Lalchhuanthanga, MLA leh Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to CM ten an telpui.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, kan lo sawi tawh thin angin thlai thar leina budget-ah kan dah a. Sawhthing hi kan lei tam ber leh lian ber a ni a, a thar pawh kan thar tam a. Mizoram sawhthing hi a tè deuh nain a quality a lo tha bik hle a, damdawia hmantlak (pharma grade) a lo tling a. A pulunga kan hralh ringawt hian a tlawmin a hlawk tawk lo va, sawngbawl hnu ngeia hralh hi a hlawk a. Tin, a chinna lamah tuna kan kal dan ang renga kan kal chuan kan leilungin a chhiatpui dawn si a. Dinhmun duhawm zawka kan din theih nan vawiinah hma thar kan la ta a ni.

Ministry of DoNER kaltlangin Sawhthing hi kan Unique Selling Proposition-ah kan puang a. Sustainable Cultivation & Post Harvest Management Project kan siam a. DoNER hian phur takin hma min lakpui a, DoNER Minister Pu Jyotiradytia Scindia chungah kan lawm hle.

A chinna lama hmalakna (sustainable cultivation) hi chu Ministry hrang hrangte nena thawkhoa kalpui tur a ni a. Post Harvest Management atan bik hian DoNER hian Rs. 30.13 Crore min rawn pe a. Sawhthing thar tam ber district Champhai district-ah pilot angin processing unit changtlung tak pali din kan tum a, vawiinah kan lo hawng ta a ni. He project hi sawhthing chingtu chhungkaw 20,000 in an chhawr tangkai turah kan ngai a, a process-na lamah hna thar 100 vel a siam bawk ang. Champhai district hi kan hlawhtlin phawt chuan district danga kalpui zelna tur sum pawh DoNER hian min pek an inhuam a ni.

Kan sawhthingte khawvel huapa thehlar kan tum dawn a, a quality that bikna te, GI Tag a nih tawhnate behchhanin sawhthing oil leh thildang hlu tak tak siamchhuah kan tum bawk a. India ram leh khawvel ram danga a thawnchhuah dan inzirtirna kalpui tan a tul tih kan hria a. Chutiang min zirtir tur chuan National Co-operative Exports Limited tluka tha an awm chuang lo va. Vawiinah anni hi chah chhuakin Sawhthing export dan tur kan zirho dawn a. Kan Sawhthing hmun leh Global Market hi thlunzawm kan tum tan dawn a ni.

Sorkar laipui hian kumin atan PM - AASHA hnuaiah Price Support Scheme a rawn siam a. Mizorama kan thlai chin Arhar Dal te, Nihawichi te leh Chhawhchhi te chu kalpui ve tur a ni a. Kumin tharchhuah atanga kalpui ve nghal tur a ni.

Arhar dal hi Minimum Support Price kg khat Rs. 84.50 a ni ang a, Nihawi hi kg khat Rs. 83.43 a ni ang a, Chhawhchhi hi kg khat Rs. 103.46 a ni ang. National Agricultural Cooperative Marketing Federation of India in Mizoram tharchhuahte hi a leisak ang a, Mizoram Agricultural Marketing Board nen an thawkho ang a, collection centre an rawn siam dawn a ni. He Minimum Support Price aia sanga hralhna hriate chuan an hralh zel thei a, support price scheme hi inphuartir loh tur a ni. He scheme kaltlanga hralhte chu Direct Benefit Transfer hmangin an Account-ah pawisa thun zel a ni ang a, middleman an awm lo vang. State sorkarin thlai thar pangaa Minimum Support Price kan pek hnuah central sorkar kaltlangin thlai dang pathum kan pe leh dawn ta a. Loneitute tan khua a var mek a ni, a ti a.

Project pahnih leh workshop te a hlawhtlin theih nan a mawhphurtute zawng zawng theihtawp chhuah turin a chah.

Pu PC Vanlalruata, Agriculture Minister leh Pu C. Lalsawivunga, Horticulture Minister te pawhin thu an sawi bawk.

Pi Ramdinliani, Secretary, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a, Pi Maria CT Zuali, Secretary, Horticulture chuan Ginger Processing Unit din dan tur ruahmanna tlangpui a sawi a ni.

Vawiina project pahnih leh workshop hawnna inkhawmah hian District hrang hrang atangin loneitute, FPOs te leh Cooperative society mi leh sa mi 250 vel zet an kalkhawm a. A hawnna inkhawm neih zawhah hian workshop hi an nei zui nghal a ni.
